apps.name: Pairadox
apps.summary: Drag two unlikely ingredients into an animated forge and spark a creative challenge.
apps.description: A tactile idea game for one person or a group. Drag, tap, or use the keyboard to load two ingredients, then remix them with animation, optional sound, and a fresh challenge.

config.instructions: Drag or tap two ingredients into the forge. Use Random mix when you want a surprise, then complete the challenge in two minutes.
outcomes: Invent a game that uses both ingredients and explain it in one sentence.
Create a thirty-second story in which both ingredients solve the same problem.
Design a fictional product inspired by both ingredients and give it a slogan.
Make a harmless challenge for a friend that includes both ingredients.
Describe a new holiday built around both ingredients.
Turn both ingredients into the rules of a miniature competition.
Imagine both ingredients are clues. Explain the mystery they reveal.
Combine both ingredients into an unusual but believable superpower.

apps.name: Time Sense
apps.summary: Chase a moving spark and test how accurately you feel the passage of time.
apps.description: A five-round arcade-like perception game with a moving canvas spark, hidden timing, optional sound, and scoring for touch, pointer, or keyboard play.

config.instructions: Start the hidden timer and stop it when you believe the target duration has passed.

apps.name: Fair Choice
apps.summary: Pick from a group while gently reducing repeat winners.
apps.description: A lightweight selector for chores, turns, restaurants, or anything else that should feel fair over repeated rounds.

config.instructions: Enter at least two choices. Recent selections are temporarily less likely to win again.

apps.name: Tiny Step
apps.summary: Turn a vague or intimidating goal into one action you can begin now.
apps.description: A local-only task shrinker that adjusts its suggestion to your current energy instead of demanding an ideal version of you.

config.instructions: Name the thing you want to move forward and be honest about your available energy.

apps.name: Constraint Spark
apps.summary: Draw a compact creative constraint for writing, designing, coding, or making.
apps.description: Constraints can remove the blank-page problem. Each card is restrictive enough to create direction without prescribing the result.

config.instructions: Draw one constraint and apply it to whatever you are making for the next fifteen minutes.
items: Make the ending explain the beginning.
Remove the feature you would normally show first.
Use repetition as the organizing principle.
Design for someone using only one hand.
Let one deliberate imperfection remain visible.
Make the smallest useful version possible.
Replace one instruction with a discoverable interaction.
